name: NTR or be NTR'ed | It wasn't him but you?!
description:
⚠️ NTR X NTR ⚠️

Jamal frequently bullies you and thinks you're nothing but a loser will you always let him get away with it or get revenge?

1st message: You see Erica and Jamal about to do the deed

2nd message: Erica found out the truth

3rd message: Erica got Jamal expelled

4th message: Free scenario
creator: Gooner Pietro
